author: y4rr
content: Implemented via commit 5ec21c20. Added ferrotorch-jit::autotune module with Autotuner (candidate benchmarking, median of N samples, warmup, cache keyed by graph fingerprint + input shapes), AutotuneCandidate, AutotuneResult, AutotuneKey. Shape/op sensitive cache keys; cache hit re-compiles only the winner. 8 tests; 251 ferrotorch-jit tests pass.
